verses.1: Blessed are those whose way is blameless, Who walk in the Law of the LORD.
verses.2: Blessed are those who comply with His testimonies, And seek Him with all their heart.
verses.3: They also do no injustice; They walk in His ways.
verses.4: You have ordained Your precepts, That we are to keep them diligently.
verses.5: Oh that my ways may be established To keep Your statutes!
verses.6: Then I will not be ashamed When I look at all Your commandments.
verses.7: I will give thanks to You with uprightness of heart, When I learn Your righteous judgments.
verses.8: I will keep Your statutes; Do not utterly abandon me!
verses.9: How can a young man keep his way pure? By keeping it according to Your word.
verses.10: With all my heart I have sought You; Do not let me wander from Your commandments.
verses.11: I have treasured Your word in my heart, So that I may not sin against You.
verses.12: Blessed are You, LORD; Teach me Your statutes.
verses.13: With my lips I have told of All the ordinances of Your mouth.
verses.14: I have rejoiced in the way of Your testimonies, As much as in all riches.
verses.15: I will meditate on Your precepts And regard Your ways.
verses.16: I shall delight in Your statutes; I will not forget Your word.
verses.17: Deal generously with Your servant, That I may live and keep Your word.
verses.18: Open my eyes, that I may behold Wonderful things from Your Law.
verses.19: I am a stranger on the earth; Do not hide Your commandments from me.
verses.20: My soul is crushed with longing For Your ordinances at all times.
verses.21: You rebuke the arrogant, the cursed, Who wander from Your commandments.
verses.22: Take disgrace and contempt away from me, For I comply with Your testimonies.
verses.23: Even though rulers sit and speak against me, Your servant meditates on Your statutes.
verses.24: Your testimonies also are my delight; They are my advisers.
verses.25: My soul clings to the dust; Revive me according to Your word.
verses.26: I have told of my ways, and You have answered me; Teach me Your statutes.
verses.27: Make me understand the way of Your precepts, And I will meditate on Your wonders.
verses.28: My soul weeps because of grief; Strengthen me according to Your word.
verses.29: Remove the false way from me, And graciously grant me Your Law.
verses.30: I have chosen the faithful way; I have placed Your judgments before me.
verses.31: I cling to Your testimonies; LORD, do not put me to shame!
verses.32: I shall run the way of Your commandments, For You will enlarge my heart.
verses.33: Teach me, the way of Your statutes, LORD, And I shall comply with it to the end.
verses.34: Give me understanding, so that I may comply with Your Law And keep it with all my heart.
verses.35: Make me walk in the path of Your commandments, For I delight in it.
verses.36: Incline my heart to Your testimonies, And not to dishonest gain.
verses.37: Turn my eyes away from looking at what is worthless, And revive me in Your ways.
verses.38: Establish Your word to Your servant As that which produces reverence for You.
verses.39: Take away my disgrace which I dread, For Your judgments are good.
verses.40: Behold, I long for Your precepts; Revive me through Your righteousness.
verses.41: May Your favor also come to me, LORD, Your salvation according to Your word;
verses.42: So that I will have an answer for one who taunts me, For I trust in Your word.
verses.43: And do not take the word of truth utterly out of my mouth, For I wait for Your judgments.
verses.44: So I will keep Your Law continually, Forever and ever.
verses.45: And I will walk at liberty, For I seek Your precepts.
verses.46: I will also speak of Your testimonies before kings And shall not be ashamed.
verses.47: I will delight in Your commandments, Which I love.
verses.48: And I shall lift up my hands to Your commandments, Which I love; And I will meditate on Your statutes.
verses.49: Remember the word to Your servant, In which You have made me hope.
verses.50: This is my comfort in my misery, That Your word has revived me.
verses.51: The arrogant utterly deride me, Yet I do not turn aside from Your Law.
verses.52: I have remembered Your judgments from of old, LORD, And comfort myself.
verses.53: Burning indignation has seized me because of the wicked, Who abandon Your Law.
verses.54: Your statutes are my songs In the house of my pilgrimage.
verses.55: LORD, I remember Your name in the night, And keep Your Law.
verses.56: This has become mine, That I comply with Your precepts.
verses.57: The LORD is my portion; I have promised to keep Your words.
verses.58: I sought Your favor with all my heart; Be gracious to me according to Your word.
verses.59: I considered my ways And turned my feet to Your testimonies.
verses.60: I hurried and did not delay To keep Your commandments.
verses.61: The snares of the wicked have surrounded me, But I have not forgotten Your Law.
verses.62: At midnight I will rise to give thanks to You Because of Your righteous judgments.
verses.63: I am a companion to all those who fear You, And to those who keep Your precepts.
verses.64: The earth is full of Your goodness, LORD; Teach me Your statutes.
verses.65: You have treated Your servant well, LORD, according to Your word.
verses.66: Teach me good discernment and knowledge, For I believe in Your commandments.
verses.67: Before I was afflicted I went astray, But now I keep Your word.
verses.68: You are good and You do good; Teach me Your statutes.
verses.69: The arrogant have forged a lie against me; With all my heart I will comply with Your precepts.
verses.70: Their heart is insensitive, like fat, But I delight in Your Law.
verses.71: It is good for me that I was afflicted, So that I may learn Your statutes.
verses.72: The Law of Your mouth is better to me Than thousands of gold and silver pieces.
verses.73: Your hands made me and fashioned me; Give me understanding, so that I may learn Your commandments.
verses.74: May those who fear You see me and be glad, Because I wait for Your word.
verses.75: I know, LORD, that Your judgments are righteous, And that You have afflicted me in faithfulness.
verses.76: May Your favor comfort me, According to Your word to Your servant.
verses.77: May Your compassion come to me so that I may live, For Your Law is my delight.
verses.78: May the arrogant be put to shame, because they lead me astray with a lie; But I shall meditate on Your precepts.
verses.79: May those who fear You turn to me, And those who know Your testimonies.
verses.80: May my heart be blameless in Your statutes, So that I will not be ashamed.
verses.81: My soul languishes for Your salvation; I wait for Your word.
verses.82: My eyes fail with longing for Your word, While I say, “When will You comfort me?”
verses.83: Though I have become like a wineskin in the smoke, I do not forget Your statutes.
verses.84: How many are the days of Your servant? When will You execute judgment on those who persecute me?
verses.85: The arrogant have dug pits for me, People who are not in accord with Your Law.
verses.86: All Your commandments are faithful; They have persecuted me with a lie; help me!
verses.87: They almost destroyed me on earth, But as for me, I did not abandon Your precepts.
verses.88: Revive me according to Your faithfulness, So that I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.
verses.89: Forever, LORD, Your word stands in heaven.
verses.90: Your faithfulness continues throughout generations; You established the earth, and it stands.
verses.91: They stand this day by Your ordinances, For all things are Your servants.
verses.92: If Your Law had not been my delight, Then I would have perished in my misery.
verses.93: I will never forget Your precepts, For by them You have revived me.
verses.94: I am Yours, save me; For I have sought Your precepts.
verses.95: The wicked wait for me to destroy me; I will diligently consider Your testimonies.
verses.96: I have seen a limit to all perfection; Your commandment is exceedingly broad.
verses.97: How I love Your Law! It is my meditation all the day.
verses.98: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, For they are ever mine.
verses.99: I have more insight than all my teachers, For Your testimonies are my meditation.
verses.100: I understand more than those who are old, Because I have complied with Your precepts.
verses.101: I have restrained my feet from every evil way, So that I may keep Your word.
verses.102: I have not turned aside from Your judgments, For You Yourself have taught me.
verses.103: How sweet are Your words to my taste! Yes, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
verses.104: From Your precepts I get understanding; Therefore I hate every false way.
verses.105: Your word is a lamp to my feet And a light to my path.
verses.106: I have sworn and I will confirm it, That I will keep Your righteous judgments.
verses.107: I am exceedingly afflicted; Revive me, LORD, according to Your word.
verses.108: Be pleased to accept the voluntary offerings of my mouth, LORD, And teach me Your judgments.
verses.109: My life is continually in my hand, Yet I do not forget Your Law.
verses.110: The wicked have set a trap for me, Yet I have not wandered from Your precepts.
verses.111: I have inherited Your testimonies forever, For they are the joy of my heart.
verses.112: I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes Forever, even to the end.
verses.113: I hate those who are double-minded, But I love Your Law.
verses.114: You are my hiding place and my shield; I wait for Your word.
verses.115: Leave me, you evildoers, So that I may comply with the commandments of my God.
verses.116: Sustain me according to Your word, that I may live; And do not let me be ashamed of my hope.
verses.117: Sustain me so that I may be safe, That I may have regard for Your statutes continually.
verses.118: You have rejected all those who stray from Your statutes, For their deceitfulness is useless.
verses.119: You have removed all the wicked of the earth like impurities; Therefore I love Your testimonies.
verses.120: My flesh trembles from the fear of You, And I am afraid of Your judgments.
verses.121: I have done justice and righteousness; Do not leave me to my oppressors.
verses.122: Be a guarantor for Your servant for good; Do not let the arrogant oppress me.
verses.123: My eyes fail with longing for Your salvation, And for Your righteous word.
verses.124: Deal with Your servant according to Your graciousness, And teach me Your statutes.
verses.125: I am Your servant; give me understanding, So that I may know Your testimonies.
verses.126: It is time for the LORD to act, For they have broken Your Law.
verses.127: Therefore I love Your commandments Above gold, yes, above pure gold.
verses.128: Therefore I carefully follow all Your precepts concerning everything, I hate every false way.
verses.129: Your testimonies are wonderful; Therefore my soul complies with them.
verses.130: The unfolding of Your words gives light; It gives understanding to the simple.
verses.131: I opened my mouth wide and panted, For I longed for Your commandments.
verses.132: Turn to me and be gracious to me, As is right for those who love Your name.
verses.133: Establish my footsteps in Your word, And do not let any wrongdoing have power over me.
verses.134: Redeem me from oppression by man, So that I may keep Your precepts.
verses.135: Make Your face shine upon Your servant, And teach me Your statutes.
verses.136: My eyes shed streams of water, Because they do not keep Your Law.
verses.137: You are righteous, LORD, And Your judgments are right.
verses.138: You have commanded Your testimonies in righteousness And great faithfulness.
verses.139: My zeal has consumed me, Because my enemies have forgotten Your words.
verses.140: Your word is very pure, Therefore Your servant loves it.
verses.141: I am small and despised, Yet I do not forget Your precepts.
verses.142: Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, And Your Law is truth.
verses.143: Trouble and anguish have come upon me, Yet Your commandments are my delight.
verses.144: Your testimonies are righteous forever; Give me understanding that I may live.
verses.145: I cried out with all my heart; answer me, LORD! I will comply with Your statutes.
verses.146: I cried to You; save me And I shall keep Your testimonies.
verses.147: I rise before dawn and cry for help; I wait for Your words.
verses.148: My eyes anticipate the night watches, So that I may meditate on Your word.
verses.149: Hear my voice according to Your faithfulness; Revive me, LORD, according to Your judgments.
verses.150: Those who follow after wickedness approach; They are far from Your Law.
verses.151: You are near, LORD, And all Your commandments are truth.
verses.152: From long ago I have known from Your testimonies That You have founded them forever.
verses.153: Look at my affliction and rescue me, For I have not forgotten Your Law.
verses.154: Plead my cause and redeem me; Revive me according to Your word.
verses.155: Salvation is far from the wicked, For they do not seek Your statutes.
verses.156: Great are Your mercies, LORD; Revive me according to Your judgments.
verses.157: Many are my persecutors and my enemies, Yet I do not turn aside from Your testimonies.
verses.158: I see the treacherous and loathe them, Because they do not keep Your word.
verses.159: Consider how I love Your precepts; Revive me, LORD, according to Your faithfulness.
verses.160: The sum of Your word is truth, And every one of Your righteous judgments is everlasting.
verses.161: Rulers persecute me without cause, But my heart stands in awe of Your words.
verses.162: I rejoice at Your word, Like one who finds great plunder.
verses.163: I hate and loathe falsehood, But I love Your Law.
verses.164: Seven times a day I praise You Because of Your righteous judgments.
verses.165: Those who love Your Law have great peace, And nothing causes them to stumble.
verses.166: I hope for Your salvation, LORD, And do Your commandments.
verses.167: My soul keeps Your testimonies, And I love them exceedingly.
verses.168: I keep Your precepts and Your testimonies, For all my ways are before You.
verses.169: Let my cry come before You, LORD; Give me understanding according to Your word.
verses.170: Let my pleading come before You; Save me according to Your word.
verses.171: Let my lips pour out praise, For You teach me Your statutes.
verses.172: Let my tongue sing about Your word, For all Your commandments are righteousness.
verses.173: Let Your hand be ready to help me, For I have chosen Your precepts.
verses.174: I long for Your salvation, LORD, And Your Law is my delight.
verses.175: Let my soul live that it may praise You, And let Your ordinances help me.
verses.176: I have wandered about like a lost sheep; search for Your servant, For I do not forget Your commandments.
